name: vessica
description: Set up and operate hosted Vessica workspaces, engineering runs, evidence, previews, harnesses, and durable knowledge through the ves CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Set up and operate hosted engineering workflows through ves.
interface.longDescription: Use the version-matched ves Go CLI to create or recover a Railway-hosted Vessica workspace, attach repositories, manage engineering harnesses, choose interactive or dispatched work, run and refine cloud coding workflows, restore ambiguity-safe shared knowledge, and review persisted evidence before approval or rollback.
defaultPrompt: Set up Vessica in this repository.
Turn this request into a Vessica epic.
Show me the status of my Vessica runs.
Review the artifacts and receipt for this Vessica run.
What does Vessica remember about this repository?
Help me configure or troubleshoot Vessica.
